data.title: Anti-Drug Groups Urge Congress To Ban Hemp-Derived Cannabinoids As Debate Grows
data.description: Anti-drug groups are urging Congress to ban hemp-derived cannabinoids like delta-8 THC. Led by CADCA, the coalition supports an amendment to the 2024 Farm Bill, citing health risks and regulatory gaps from the 2018 legislation
